criteria.name: AI Feature Variety
criteria.description: Diversity of AI-driven entertainment features offered (e.g., personalized content generation, style transfer, interactive experiences).
criteria.sources: App Store descriptions, Google Play Store descriptions, User reviews, Expert reviews

criteria.name: User Rating
criteria.description: Average user rating on app stores (e.g., Google Play Store, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded or installed.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Content Personalization
criteria.description: The extent to which the app personalizes content based on user preferences and behavior.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, User reviews, Expert reviews

criteria.name: Creative Output Quality
criteria.description: Quality and originality of AI-generated content (images, videos, music, text).
criteria.sources: User reviews, Expert reviews, Example outputs

criteria.name: Ease of Use
criteria.description: How easy it is for users to navigate and use the app's features.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and improvements.
criteria.sources: App Store update history, Google Play Store update history

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: The cost of subscription if aplicable.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, App website
